# Q 

2 

M 

IRON REDEFINED

## Exterior / maintenance

### All surface ferrous contamination remover.

Q²M Iron REDEFINED is a fast-acting iron remover designed to decontaminate surfaces of ferrous deposits, including brake dust and rail dust. Despite its strong reaction, it maintains a neutral pH, allowing safe use on a wide range of materials while delivering efficient decontamination.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_iron_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Effective iron filling remover.

Q²M Iron REDEFINED simplifies the decontamination process by quickly dissolving iron contamination without harming delicate surfaces. Its refined formula improves user comfort while maintaining high effectiveness.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons39.svg)

NO ODOUR 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons54.svg)

INSTANT ACTION 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons19.svg)

SUITABLE ON ALL SURFACES 

what makes

Q2M IRON REDEFINED so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/iron_1-1024x576.jpg)

Neutral pH for safe use on delicate materials

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mironredefined.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML

PH LEVEL

NEUTRAL

Consumption

150ml/car

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

IRON REDEFINED

01
Spray Q²M Iron REDEFINED onto a cool surface. 

02
Allow the product to react with ferrous contamination. 

03
Agitate lightly if needed. 

04
Rinse thoroughly with water. 

05
Do not allow the product to dry on the surface. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What contamination does Q²M Iron REDEFINED remove? 

It removes ferrous deposits such as brake and rail dust.

02
Is it safe for delicate surfaces? 

Yes. The formula maintains a neutral pH.

03
Does it have a strong smell? 

The redefined formula features an improved scent.

04
Can it be used on wheels and paint? 

Yes. It is suitable for multiple exterior surfaces.

05
How often should iron decontamination be performed? 

As needed, depending on contamination level.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000260578-Q-M-Iron)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
